name: Shuffle Curse
desc: Cards reshuffle position every 15s — stay sharp!

name: Burning Cards
desc: Wrong unscramble = YOU take 1 Burn stack — stay sharp!

name: Frozen Grid
desc: Match timer runs 25% faster this round.

name: Shock Protocol
desc: Correct unscramble shocks alien for extra 10% HP.

name: Barrier Field
desc: Your next wrong unscramble is blocked — no damage once.

name: Poison Cloud
desc: Each wrong flip poisons you for 3% max HP.

name: Vital Surge
desc: Correct unscramble heals you for 8% max HP.

name: Alien Sight
desc: Alien attacks for 10% extra damage this round.

name: Critical Wave
desc: Correct unscramble has 30% chance to deal double damage.

name: Precision Lock
desc: Wrong unscramble deals 15% max HP to you instead of 10%.

name: Mirror Field
desc: Wrong unscramble heals alien by 5% HP — don't mess up!

name: Amplifier
desc: Correct unscramble damage is doubled this round.

name: Gravity Pull
desc: Successfully match a pair → instant +5 seconds.

name: Storm Protocol
desc: Correct unscramble shocks alien; wrong unscramble shocks YOU.
